summary: Bug fix verification complete: 'later build gate' error is FIXED. All 18 games are now playable with real server-authoritative engines. Tested backend APIs (25/25 passed) and frontend user flows. The exact reported user flow (login → Games → Seven-Up-Down → play) works perfectly with no errors.

backend_issues.notes: All backend gameplay endpoints working correctly. All 18 games return 200 responses with proper outcomes, balance updates, and ledger entries.

frontend_issues.notes: Frontend gameplay integration working correctly. Games load, play, show results, and update balance. No 'later build gate' error found anywhere.
